sentences.arabic: قَدَّمْتُ طَلَبَ التَّأْشِيرَةِ قَبْلَ السَّفَرِ بِشَهْرٍ كَامِلٍ.
sentences.translation: Podnio sam zahtjev za vizu cijeli mjesec prije putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: I submitted the visa application a full month before travelling.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعْتُ الأَوْرَاقَ الْمَطْلُوبَةِ مِنْ جَوَازِ سَفَرٍ وَصُوَرٍ وَكَشْفِ حِسَابٍ.
sentences.translation: Skupio sam tražene dokumente: pasoš, fotografije i bankovni izvod.
sentences.translationEn: I gathered the required documents: passport, photos, and bank statement.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى السَّفَارَةِ فِي الْمَوْعِدِ الْمُحَدَّدِ وَأَجَبْتُ عَلَى أَسْئِلَةِ الْمُوَظَّفِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u ambasadu u zakazano vrijeme i odgovorio na pitanja službenika.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the embassy at the appointed time and answered the officer's questions.

sentences.translation: Čekao sam dva tjedna dok nije došla suglasnost.
sentences.translationEn: I waited two weeks until the approval came.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحْتُ كَثِيرًا حِينَ رَأَيْتُ التَّأْشِيرَةَ فِي جَوَازِ سَفَرِي.
sentences.translation: Jako sam se obradovao kad sam ugledao vizu u svom pasošu.
sentences.translationEn: I was very happy when I saw the visa in my passport.
